data.title: Donald Trump May Announce SEC Chair Pick Tomorrow: Report
data.description: Trump to announce new SEC chair, potentially ending Gensler's aggressive enforcement of crypto. Leading candidates include Paul Atkins, Hester Peirce, and Mark Uyeda.

data.title: Ricki Lake Partners With Stone Road Farms To Launch Limited-Edition Cannabis Pouch
Ocean Power Technologies Sees Strong Q2 Revenue Growth But Shares Drop Amid Losses And Cash Burn
data.description: OPTT shares down after reporting preliminary Q2 results with revenue exceeding $2M and net loss decreasing by 40%. Company expects to achieve profitability by Q4 2025.

data.title: Donaldson Beats On Q1 Earnings On Strong Volumes, Reaffirms FY25 Guidance
data.description: Donaldson Company reported first-quarter results, with sales up 6.4% Y/Y to $900.1 million, led by higher volume growth. Adjusted EPS of $0.83 beat consensus, and the company reiterated its full-year outlook.

data.title: Exploring KNOT Offshore Partners's Earnings Expectations
